provenance: Shape-faithful recording of a models-list response as observed by the operator on the recorded_at date. Retained as a fixture for offline replay. Entries are provider self-report and are not independently corroborated; the recording may be stale relative to the live catalog. Corrected after the first live capture (2026-07-23): the recorded entries originally carried context_window, which no live models-list response returns. A fixture must not exercise a path live capture cannot reach.
